name: Arqit Quantum (ARQQ)
summary: Arqit 并不是通用量子计算硬件公司，而是量子安全加密和后量子密码迁移标的。它的核心看点在于国防、电信和企业安全客户是否会加速采用量子安全方案，而不是量子处理器性能。

en.summary: Arqit is positioned around quantum-safe encryption and post-quantum security rather than building general-purpose quantum computers. Its commercial story depends on enterprise, telecom and government adoption of quantum-safe security products.

newsQuery: (Arqit OR Arqit Quantum OR quantum encryption)

route.label: 量子网络与安全 Quantum Network / Security
route.summary: 围绕量子安全通信、后量子密码与网络基础设施展开，更偏应用层和安全层，而非通用量子硬件本身。

en.label: Quantum Network / Security
en.summary: Covers quantum-secure communications, post-quantum cryptography and network infrastructure. It is more application- and security-layer oriented than general-purpose quantum hardware.

$29.3 万

全年（税前）净亏损：US$23.9 million

en.label: 2024 Quantum Revenue
en.value: FY2024 revenue was about $293K. Pretax net loss was about $23.9M.

earningsReports.label: 2024 年报
earningsReports.content: 在 2024 财年，公司收入约 US$293,000，相比 2023 年的约 US$640,000 有所下降

en.label: FY2024 Annual Report
en.content: Arqit's FY2024 revenue was about $293K, down from about $640K in FY2023. The company remained focused on quantum-safe encryption software and early defense/telecom commercialization rather than quantum hardware.

earningsReports.label: 2025 Q1
earningsReports.content:
财报：https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1859690/000110465925051848/arqq-20250522xex99d1.htm?utm

收入：USD 67000
净亏损：USD1720万

将 Arqit 的对称密钥协议软件嵌入到出售给美国国防部 (DoD) 的一项受资助备案项目的解决方案中。该解决方案与国防部的一家大型IT供应商合作

en.label: 2025 Q1
en.content: Q1 materials reported revenue of about $67K and a net loss of about $17.2M. Arqit highlighted embedding its symmetric-key agreement software into a U.S. Department of Defense-funded solution with a major IT supplier.

en.label: 2025 Q2
en.content: Arqit reports on a semiannual cadence, so there was no conventional Q2 quarterly report in the source file. The company should be tracked through half-year revenue, defense wins, telecom partnerships and cash usage.

fundamentalAnalysis.business:
目前主要业务：
1. 核心技术路线：对称密钥协商
（1.1）原理：Arqit 通过一种称为 Symmetric Key Agreement (SKA) 的协议，让端点设备和网络节点动态生成一次性对称密钥，而不依赖于传统的基于大整数或椭圆曲线的公钥交换。
（1.2）抗量子优势：对称密钥加密算法在量子攻击下只需加倍密钥长度即可保持安全性，因此 SKA + 强对称加密被视为更容易抵御未来的量子计算攻击。
（1.3）去硬件化转型：Arqit 最初计划利用量子卫星分发熵种子，但 2022 年起战略调整，不再建设自有卫星，强调“无需量子硬件即可实现量子级安全”，而是将 SKA 完全实现为云端/软件平台，大幅降低部署成本并提升扩展性。
2. QuantumCloud™ 平台
（2.1）功能：这是Arqit的旗舰SaaS/PaaS服务，部署在标准云或数据中心，能够为数百万设备提供量子安全密钥生成和分发。客户可通过API或SDK将 QuantumCloud集成到现有网络设备、VPN、防火墙、移动应用或 IoT平台中，实现端到端加密与密钥轮换。既可在公有云（AWS、Azure 等）部署，也支持私有化/本地化数据中心安装，以满足政府或高敏感行业的合规需求。
3. 集成与生态
（3.1）网络设备集成：与 Juniper Networks 合作，在其 SRX 系列防火墙上演示量子安全 VPN；与 Fabric Networks 签署商业许可，为运营商提供量子安全网络；参与 Vodafone Tomorrow Street Scaleup X 项目，加速量子安全在电信网络中的应用。
（3.2）政府与标准化：入选 英国国家网络安全中心（NCSC）PQC 迁移试点，帮助英国公共部门和关键行业进行量子安全迁移；
fundamentalAnalysis.ceoMedia:
2025年9月16日，Fabric Networks 购买了 Arqit 的 NetworkSecure™ 平台的商业 Private Instance（私有实例）许可证，用来在它们的客户基础设施中部署量子安全网络。https://ir.arqit.uk/news-events/press-releases/detail/113/fabric-networks-purchases-commercial-license-from-arqit-to-deploy-quantumsafe-networks-at-scale?utm_source=chatgpt.com

2025年3月底，Arqit 的对称密钥协商软件被集成到一个由大型 IT 供应商为美国国防部提供的系统中，作为一个被认可的 “program of record” 合同。这是 Arqit 第一次获得美国国防部正式批准合同。https://ir.arqit.uk/news-events/press-releases/detail/107/arqit-quantum-inc-announces-financial-results-for-first-half-of-fiscal-year-2025?utm_source=chatgpt.com

2025年4月初，Arqit 与某 Tier-1 网络运营商（覆盖 32 个国家，拥有超过 600,000 公里的光纤干线）签署三年合同。该合同将 Arqit 的 NetworkSecure 技术作为其 (NaaS 套件的一部分来部署，为电信网络提供量子安全基础设施服务。现已可供企业与政府用户订购。

2025年5月22日，Arqit 的 NetworkSecure 技术被集成到 Intel TDX 创建的受信域中，为机密计算 加载量子安全对称密钥保护。本质是使数据在端点 / enclave 内部获得量子安全保护

en.business:
Business and product focus
1. Quantum-safe encryption software and key-agreement products for telecom, defense and enterprise customers.
2. Post-quantum cryptography planning and encryption intelligence tools.
3. Partnerships and pilots with network operators, security providers and government-related customers.
en.financial: Revenue remains modest and volatile. Recent updates point to revenue softness but potentially meaningful U.S. defense and telecom opportunities.
en.latestQuarter: The latest quarter data in the source file is limited. Recent news emphasizes a registered direct offering, telecom partnerships and post-quantum planning products.
en.ceoMedia: Arqit public updates focus on quantum-safe encryption partnerships, telecom tests, defense wins and capital-market activity.
